title: heliotropium ovalifolium var. depressum
intro: Heliotropium ovalifolium var. depressum, also known as small leaf heliotrope, is a plant species that belongs to the borage family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of this plant include its antifungal and antibacterial properties, which can help in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Heliotropium ovalifolium var. depressum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. It can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by steeping the leaves and flowers of the plant in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
